## Summary

Describe the contract or workflow changed and why.

## Validation

List the exact commands and relevant hosted checks.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and follows the documented public contracts or records a durable decision.
- [ ] New behavior has focused tests and broader coverage where needed.
- [ ] Generated files were produced by `feedforgec`, not hand-edited.
- [ ] Documentation and release notes are updated when contracts changed.
- [ ] No credentials, proprietary captures, or licensed exchange data are included.
